title: Caldera - System Network Configuration Discovery (Windows)
description: Detects network configuration enumeration on Windows systems as emulated by Caldera T1016 operations. Adversaries run ipconfig, arp, nslookup, and PowerShell network cmdlets to identify interfaces, DNS settings, and proxies.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\ipconfig.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/all*' or 'Command Line' like '*/displaydns*' or 'Command Line' like '*/flushdns*')) or ('Process Name' like '*\\arp.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*-a*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\nslookup.exe') or (('Command Line' like '*Get-NetIPConfiguration*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-NetIPAddress*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-DnsClientServerAddress*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-NetAdapter*')))
falsepositives: IT support scripts collecting network diagnostics
